zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Lucy Hungerford於1567年出生在英國維爾爾海斯波利時，她的父親Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley44歲，母親Lady Anne Pelham Dormer31歲。她於1582年10月14日與Sir John St. John在英國英格蘭維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年6月4日在英國奧可福爾布萊克 布爾頓享年31歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Lucy Hungerford于1567年出生在英国維爾爾海斯波利时，她的父亲Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley44岁，母亲Lady Anne Pelham Dormer31岁。她于1582年10月14日与Sir John St. John在英国英格兰維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年6月4日在英国奧可福爾布萊克 布爾頓享年31岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Lucy Hungerford was born in 1567, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley, was 44 and her mother, Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, was 31. She married Sir John St. John on 14 October 1582, in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 4 June 1598, in Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Lucy Hungerford est née en 1567, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John St. John le 14 octobre 1582, à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1598, à Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Lucy Hungerford 1567 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley 44 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Pelham Dormer 31. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1582 in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John St. John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1598 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Lucy Hungerford è nata il nel 1567 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John St. John il 14 ottobre 1582, nel Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1598, nel Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Lucy Hungerfordが1567年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farleyは44歳，母Lady Anne Pelham Dormerは31歳であった。1582年10月14日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズでSir John St. Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年6月4日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブラック ボウルトンで31歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Lucy Hungerford(이)가 1567년 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Pelham Dormer(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1582년 10월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에서 Sir John St. John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 6월 4일 영국 스퍼드실르 블랙 부르턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Lucy Hungerford nasceu em 1567, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St. John em 14 de outubro de 1582, em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1598, em Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Lucy Hungerford родилась в 1567 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St. John 14 октября 1582 г. в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 4 июня 1598 г. в местности блэкк буртон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Lucy Hungerford nació en 1567, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Pelham Dormer, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John St. John el 14 de octubre de 1582, en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1598, en Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
